Exception Reason: AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole managed policy is appropriate for the post-confirmation stub Lambda which only logs events
Rule Info: The IAM user, role, or group uses AWS managed policies.
The IAM entity contains wildcard permissions and does not have a cdk-nag rule suppression with evidence for those permission.

Exception Reason: Node.js 20 is the latest LTS runtime supported by Lambda at time of implementation
Rule Info: The non-container Lambda function is not configured to use the latest runtime version.
The Cognito user pool does not have a password policy that minimally specify a password length of at least 8 characters, as well as requiring uppercase, numeric, and special characters.

Exception Reason: MFA not required for dev environment — deferred to production hardening phase (Spec 14)
Rule Info: The Cognito user pool does not require MFA.
The Cognito user pool does not have AdvancedSecurityMode set to ENFORCED.
